tacos.name: Tacos

ingredients.item: Carton campbell's® mexican style tomato soup

instructions: Cook and stir beef in a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat until well browned and crumbly, 7 to 9 minutes. Pour off any fat. Season with salt and pepper.
Stir soup into the skillet and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low and cook, stirring often, until soup is reduced, about 5 minutes.
Divide beef mixture among taco shells. Top with lettuce, tomato, and cheese.

tajin-seasoned-vegetable-spears.name: Tajín-seasoned Vegetable Spears

ingredients.item: Tajín clásico seasoning or other spice mix

instructions: Place jicama, cucumbers, and hearts of palm cut sides up on cutting board and squeeze lime halves over. Sprinkle with Tajín and season with salt.
Arrange vegetables upright in tall glasses or jars to serve.

tangerine-salad-lezzet.name: Tangerine Salad
instructions: 1. Get in the pan with olive oil without shell and roast with sustring with bread.
2. Leave to cool.
3. Wash the Mediterranean greenery and dry well and take it to the service plate.
4. Peel the shells of Tangerine & add it to the salad thoroughly and thoroughly clean it.
5. Add and blend almonds and blueberries.
6. Sos inner tighten the water of the tangerine.
7. Mix honey, olive oil, salt and thoroughly.
8. Visit the salad’s veuuml; to the beach and serve.

tangy-greens-with-bacon-y-breadcrumbs.name: Tangy Greens With Bacon-y Breadcrumbs

ingredients.item: Of little gem lettuce or 1 large head of romaine lettuce

instructions: Vigorously whisk buttermilk, mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic, and ¼ cup dill in a medium bowl to combine; season dressing with salt and pepper. Set aside for serving.

Cook bacon in a medium skillet over medium heat, stirring often as it begins to crisp, until browned and mostly crisp, 6–8 minutes. Keep bacon in pan and spoon out all but 2 Tbsp. fat into a small bowl.

Add panko to skillet and return to medium heat. Cook, stirring often, until panko is golden and crisp, about 2 minutes (don’t walk away; panko will toast slowly at first but can easily burn around edges of skillet). Add up to 1 Tbsp. fat in bowl back to pan if breadcrumbs look dry. Remove from heat, add remaining ¼ cup dill, and toss to combine. Season breadcrumb mixture with salt and pepper and transfer to a medium bowl.

Arrange one third of lettuce on a platter and top with one third of tomatoes; season with salt. Generously drizzle some reserved dressing over and scatter some breadcrumb mixture on top. Repeat layers 2 more times. Top salad with an extra shower of breadcrumb mixture, then lemon zest.

tart-with-caramelized-onions-argiro.name: Tart With Caramelized Onions

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons of parmesan very slightly ground
4-6 pieces of fresh goat cheese without the casing (or manouri)
2 tablespoons of parmesan very slightly ground
4-6 pieces of fresh goat cheese without the casing (or manouri)

instructions: Three doses are made for three salt tarts with caramelized onions. Store 1 week in the refrigerator or for months in the freezer.
Melt the butter, add the onions cut in half or at 4.
Bake with a lid on low heat for 10 minutes and when to mix.
Remove the cap and add the sugar and white balsamic cream and continue cooking for another 20′, string regularly until the onions caramelize and drink all their liquids. Let them cool.
Cut in half the long, long tomatoes and sprinkle them with olive oil.
Mix them in a baking pan.
Bake in a strong 220oC ocean for about 15-20′′.

tart-basic-dough-for-savory-and-sweet-ta.name: Tart: Basic Dough For Savory And Sweet Tarts
tart-basic-dough-for-savory-and-sweet-ta.original_name: Τάρτα: Βασική ζύμη για αλμυρές και γλυκές τάρτες

ingredients.item: 150 grout cut into frame at room temperature
1-2 tsp. cold milk or cold water
150 grout cut into frame at room temperature
1-2 tsp. cold milk or cold water

instructions: We sift flour and salt on a work bench, creating a "folk".
Add the sugar and butter pieces.
With a knife cut the butter into the flour with quick moves until the mixture looks like wet sand.
We make a pothole downtown and add the egg.
Mix with fork and then, with fingertips, begin to combine the dough.
If the dough looks dry and rubs, add some cold water or milk.
Depending on the temperature or dryness of the flour the dough may require or not more moisture.
We ferment quickly, pushing the dough with the palm and gathering it again. Repeat 2-3 times, until we have a smooth and soft texture.
Give the dough a spherical shape and wrap with membrane.
Place in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
This quantity covers a tourniquet of 26-28 cm.

thai-duck-and-grapefruit-salad.name: Thai Duck And Grapefruit Salad

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: peeled and white pith removed, cut into segments

instructions: Season duck breast with salt and pepper and cook in a skillet to medium-rare; let rest, then thinly slice.
Whisk garlic, oil, fish sauce, lemon juice, ginger, and sugar in a large bowl; add duck, scallions, cilantro sprigs, mint leaves, and grapefruit segments and toss.

thai-fried-rice-with-marinated-chicken.name: Thai Fried Rice With Marinated Chicken
instructions: Combine chicken thighs, 2 tablespoons soy sauce, brown sugar, and black pepper in a bowl. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator, 2 hours to overnight.
Heat a wok or very large skillet over high heat for 30 seconds. Pour in vegetable oil. Reduce heat to medium; add onion and garlic. Cook and stir until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Increase heat to high and add marinated chicken to the wok; cook, stirring constantly, until no longer pink, about 4 minutes.

Push chicken mixture to one side of the wok; pour eggs into the empty side. Cook until just starting to set, about 2 minutes. Stir eggs slowly until scrambled; mix into chicken mixture. Season with 3 tablespoons soy sauce, sugar, and white pepper; stir for 1 minute.
Stir rice into the wok until evenly incorporated and heated through, about 4 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in green onion and cilantro. Mix gently until combined.

three-ingredient-raspberry-dessert.name: Three Ingredient Raspberry Dessert
instructions: Distribute frozen raspberries amongst 8 small glasses. Add 2 to 3 tablespoons of Greek yogurt to each glass and sprinkle a thick layer of brown sugar over each. Refrigerate uncovered for 24 hours so sugar crystallizes.

three-peas-with-barley-chile-green-garli.name: Three Peas With Barley, Chile & Green Garlic

ingredients.item: Sambal oelek or other pure chile paste

ingredients.prep: 1/4 cup (3/4 oz/20 g) thinly sliced, or 4 cloves garlic, minced

instructions: Bring a large saucepan half full of salted water to a boil over high heat.
Add the snap peas and English peas and cook until tender-crisp, about 1 minute.
Using a slotted spoon, transfer the vegetables to a colander and rinse under cold water. Set aside.
Return the saucepan to a boil, add the barley and cook until tender, about 45 minutes.
Drain and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk together the rice vinegar, soy sauce, 2 tbsp water, brown sugar, and sambal oelek until blended.
In a large, heavy frying pan over high heat, warm the sesame oil.
Add the green garlic, green onions, and lime leaves and stir-fry until the green onions are tender, about 30 seconds.
Add the reserved snap peas, English peas, and barley along with the pea shoots, and stir to coat.
Pour in the soy sauce mixture and stir and toss until the peas and pea shoots are tender and the liquid is absorbed, about 4 minutes.
Transfer to a warmed serving dish and serve.

thyme-honey-glazed-ham.name: Thyme Honey Glazed Ham

ingredients.item: Boneless or semiboneless fully cooked ham at room temperature 1 hour

instructions: Melt butter with thyme and let stand until ready to use.
Preheat oven to 177°C with rack in lower third.

Peel off and discard any rind or skin from ham, leaving 1/4 inch of fat on ham. Score fat on top of ham in a crosshatch pattern without cutting into meat. Put ham on a rack in a large roasting pan. Cover ham with parchment paper, then cover roasting pan with foil. Bake 1 3/4 hours.

Meanwhile, boil vinegar in a small saucepan until reduced to about 1 tablespoon. Remove from heat and whisk in honey, Worcestershire sauce, and thyme butter. Let honey glaze stand until ham has baked 1 3/4 hours.

Discard foil and parchment from ham. If there is no liquid in roasting pan, add 1 cup water (liquid will prevent glaze from burning in pan). Brush ham with half of honey glaze, then bake, uncovered, 30 minutes.
Brush with remaining glaze and bake until glaze is deep golden-brown and ham is heated through, about 30 minutes more.

tomato-tower-with-pesto-sauce-lezzet.name: Tomato Tower With Pesto Sauce
instructions: 1. slice tomatoes evenly in thickness.
2. Peel the garlic.
3.  Maydanozu temizleyin.
4. Mix white cheese and labyne cheese with fork.
5. Take the kneader roll shape with your hands and wait for 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
6.  Rulo peyniri dilimleyin.
7. Paste Maydanoz, feslene, garlic, peanut, oil, parsley, fesle leaves, salt and pepper in the robot.
8. 5 tomatoes in the service plate by placing cheese slices on the interval of 5 tomatoes.
9. Visit pesto sauce on it.
10. Decorate and serve with lemon peel and phenol leaves.

tomatoes-with-creamy-feta.name: Tomatoes With Creamy Feta

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Mash 4 oz. feta, crumbled, in a small bowl with a fork. Add ½ cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt and mix until combined, then mix in zest of 1 lemon, 1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, 1 Tbsp. olive oil, and 1 Tbsp. chopped mint. Season feta spread with freshly ground black pepper and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt.
Just before serving, heat remaining 2 Tbsp. olive oil in a small saucepan over medium. Cook ¼ tsp. smoked paprika, swirling pan, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Let cool slightly.

Transfer feta spread to a large shallow bowl and pile 1½ lb. mixed heirloom tomatoes, sliced, quartered, or halved, on top. Sprinkle with flaky sea salt and pepper. Drizzle paprika oil over; top with mint leaves.
Do ahead: Spread can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

tortellini-in-chicken-broth.name: Tortellini In Chicken Broth

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Stir broth and water together in a pot; bring to a boil.

Stir frozen tortellini into broth mixture and cook, occasionally stirring, until tortellini floats to the top and filling is hot, 6 to 8 minutes. Stir watercress and scallions into broth mixture and cook until watercress wilts, about 2 minutes. Add hot pepper sauce.
Sprinkle with Romano cheese and black pepper to serve.

traditional-meat-lasagna-teleculinaria.name: Traditional Meat Lasagna

ingredients.item: 350 g tomato in pieces (without skin or grains)

instructions: Light a pot with water, oil and salt and let it boil. Add the lasagna leaves and let cook for 5 minutes. Then pass them cold water, dry them with absorbent paper and reserve.

Light a pot with half the olive oil and the laurel leaf and let it warm. Add the minced meat and let it cook, stirring until it is loose. Season with salt and pepper and stir. Remove from the flame, transfer it to a drainer and let it run.

On the other side, melt the butter, add the flour and, without stopping stirring, let it boil 1 or 2 minutes. Add the milk in yarn and keep stirring until it thickens. Season with salt, pepper and nutmeg, remove from the fire and reserve.

Bring another pot to the fire with the remaining oil, garlic and onions, chopped, and let it shine. Add the tomato, season with salt, sugar, nutmeg, pepper and oregano and stir. Add the meat, correct the seasonings and remove from the fire.

In a pyrox or refractory container (30x20 cm), make alternate layers of bechamel sauce, lasagna leaves and meat. The last layer should be bechamel sauce. Sprinkle with grated cheese and light oven, preheated to 180°C, until gratin.

traditional-mince-pies.name: Traditional Mince Pies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Sift flour, 1/4 cup confectioners' sugar, and cinnamon together in a large bowl. Use a pastry cutter or two forks to mix in butter until mixture resembles fine crumbs. Stir in orange zest. Sprinkle with ice water and gather dough into a ball. Roll out on a lightly floured surface to 1/4 inch thick. Cut out approximately 18 (3-inch) diameter circles, and 18 (2-inch) circles, re-rolling dough as needed.

Line muffin cups or mini tart tins using the 3-inch pastry circles. Fill each pastry cup with about 1 tablespoon of mincemeat filling. Top with 2-inch pastry circles, sealing edges firmly together or crimping lightly with a fork to prevent the filling from leaking as they cook. Brush the top of each pie with egg.
Bake mince pies in preheated oven until tops are golden brown, 15 to 20 minutes. Cool slightly on wire racks. Dust with remaining 1/4 cup confectioners' sugar just before serving.

traditional-pie-with-leek-and-sausage-ar.name: Traditional Pie With Leek And Sausage
traditional-pie-with-leek-and-sausage-ar.original_name: Παραδοσιακή πίτα με πράσο και λουκάνικο

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 kg pieces (medium in size and Tenderly)
11⁄2 kg pieces (medium in size and Tenderly)

instructions: Cut the leeks and fresh onions into slices and chop the dried onions.
Leave them on low heat, with some olive oil, until they wither.
They can't be colored.

transmontana-rabbit-teleculinaria.name: Transmontana Rabbit
instructions: Cut the rabbits to pieces. Peel and pinch finely the onions and parsley. Book some parsley for the end.
Place rabbit pieces, onion and parsley in alternate layers in a pan. Season with salt and pepper, water with olive oil, add the lard and cover with white wine.

Tape o tacho, leve ao lume e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, agitando o tacho de vez em quando. Quando o coelho estiver tenro, retifique os temperos e transfira para uma travessa. Polvilhe com mais salsa e sirva com batatas cozidas.

tropical-mango-bread.name: Tropical Mango Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease two (8 ½x4 ½-inch) loaf pans.

Whisk flour, white sugar, 2 teaspoons cinnamon, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl until combined; make a well in center. Add pineapple, mango, oil, eggs, coconut, macadamia nuts, and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract to the well; mix. Divide batter between the prepared loaf pans.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into centers comes out clean, 45 to 50 minutes. Cool in the pans for 5 minutes. Remove loaves from pans; cool completely on a wire rack.
Whisk confectioners' sugar, hot water, melted butter, and ½ teaspoon vanilla extract together in a bowl until smooth. Add more hot water to reach desired consistency. Pour glaze over cooled loaves.

tulum-cheese-muffin-with-black-cumin-lez.name: Tulum Cheese Muffin With Black Cumin

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons of fine chopped dereot  u

instructions: 1. Eggs and milk together a few minutesrrp.
2. Add the olive oil to the mixture uniformly add 1-2 minutes more add boiled and baking powder after roasting.
3. Then mix well by adding dough, bag cheese, dereotu, swelling, salt and precipitation.
4. Share the mixture into muffin molds you lubricate.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes in the oven heated from 200 degrees.
6. Serve your service.

tuna-and-egg-sandwich-caterpillars-telec.name: Tuna And Egg Sandwich Caterpillars
tuna-and-egg-sandwich-caterpillars-telec.original_name: Lagartinhas de sanduíches de atum e ovo

ingredients.item: 1 medium package sliced bread without code (approx. 500 g)

instructions: Cook the eggs, boil them for 12 minutes, cool them in cold water, peel them and cut them into thin slices. Cut the bread slices in shape with a small round rim.

Lay the tuna in a bowl, add the mayonnaise, ketchup, onion and chopped olives very finely and mix well until a paste is left. Add chopped parsley and season with a pinch of salt and pepper. Bar the bread circles with this paste and have a boiled egg round on top. Put one on top of the other and tie it with sticks, making four little lizards.
Wash the cucumber, cut it into thick slices, make some smaller circles to make the eyes, cut the remaining into small triangles and place them on the sides, as you see in the image.
With cherry tomatoes, cucumber slices, chives and a little olive, build the caterpillar head and attach it with a toothpick.

turkey-cheese-pinwheels.name: Turkey & Cheese Pinwheels
instructions: Spread the mustard on the tortilla, and lay down the cheese and turkey.
Tightly roll up the tortilla, and cut into slices.
Serve with a clementine and sliced bell pepper.
Enjoy!
